markdownRemark.html:
Awesome Game Talks

[2005] Heart of a Gamer: Satoru Iwata (Nintendo)

On my business card, I am a corporate president. In my mind, I am a game developer. But in my heart, I am a gamer.

Check out contribution guidelines and other awesomestars164.9k stuff!

GDC has a channel now: https://www.youtube.com/c/gdconf

If you want just a list of free GDC talks: GDC
